languages.text: {n}Внимание К'тан обращается к вам — вы ощущаете это столь же отчетливо, как если бы касание нечеловеческого разума было материально. Спустя мгновения чудовищного веса, возложенного на ваши плечи, тяжесть исчезает — и вместо этого в освобожденный разум начинает течь знакомая речь Тразина Неисчислимого.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Внимание К'тан обращается к вам — вы ощущаете это столь же отчетливо, как если бы касание нечеловеческого разума было материально. Спустя мгновения чудовищного веса, возложенного на ваши плечи, тяжесть исчезает — и вместо этого в освобожденный разум начинает течь знакомая речь Тразина Неисчислимого.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The C'tan's attention turns to you — you feel it as clearly as if the touch of this inhuman mind were a tangible thing. It lands like a monstrous weight upon your shoulders, but a few moments later, the heaviness disappears — and instead, the familiar speech of Trazyn the Infinite begins to flow into your now free mind.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Внимание К'тан обращается к вам — вы ощущаете это столь же отчетливо, как если бы касание нечеловеческого разума было материально. Спустя мгновения чудовищного веса, возложенного на ваши плечи, тяжесть исчезает — и вместо этого в освобожденный разум начинает течь знакомая речь Тразина Неисчислимого.{/n}

{n}The C'tan's attention turns to you — you feel it as clearly as if the touch of this inhuman mind were a tangible thing. It lands like a monstrous weight upon your shoulders, but a few moments later, the heaviness disappears — and instead, the familiar speech of Trazyn the Infinite begins to flow into your now free mind.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那星神的注意力转向了你——你能清晰地感觉到这一点，仿佛那非人的意识真的触碰到了你。那骇人的重量压在你肩上，但片刻之后，这种压迫感消失了。随即，无限者特拉金那熟悉的话语开始涌入你那重获自由的心智。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The C'tan's attention turns to you — you feel it as clearly as if the touch of this inhuman mind were a tangible thing. It lands like a monstrous weight upon your shoulders, but a few moments later, the heaviness disappears — and instead, the familiar speech of Trazyn the Infinite begins to flow into your now free mind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那星神的注意力转向了你——你能清晰地感觉到这一点，仿佛那非人的意识真的触碰到了你。那骇人的重量压在你肩上，但片刻之后，这种压迫感消失了。随即，无限者特拉金那熟悉的话语开始涌入你那重获自由的心智。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El C'tan dirige hacia ti su atención. La sensación es tan clara como si el toque de su mente inhumana fuese tangible. Recae sobre tus hombros como un peso abrumador, pero a los pocos momentos el peso se esfuma, dando paso a la ya familiar voz de Trazyn el Infinito, que aparece en tu mente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The C'tan's attention turns to you — you feel it as clearly as if the touch of this inhuman mind were a tangible thing. It lands like a monstrous weight upon your shoulders, but a few moments later, the heaviness disappears — and instead, the familiar speech of Trazyn the Infinite begins to flow into your now free mind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El C'tan dirige hacia ti su atención. La sensación es tan clara como si el toque de su mente inhumana fuese tangible. Recae sobre tus hombros como un peso abrumador, pero a los pocos momentos el peso se esfuma, dando paso a la ya familiar voz de Trazyn el Infinito, que aparece en tu mente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le C'tan tourne son attention vers vous. Vous la sentez de manière palpable, comme si le contact de son esprit non-humain était un phénomène tangible. Son poids monstrueux fait ployer vos épaules, mais quelques instants plus tard, la sensation disparaît, et la voix familière de Trazyn l'Infini envahit votre esprit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The C'tan's attention turns to you — you feel it as clearly as if the touch of this inhuman mind were a tangible thing. It lands like a monstrous weight upon your shoulders, but a few moments later, the heaviness disappears — and instead, the familiar speech of Trazyn the Infinite begins to flow into your now free mind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le C'tan tourne son attention vers vous. Vous la sentez de manière palpable, comme si le contact de son esprit non-humain était un phénomène tangible. Son poids monstrueux fait ployer vos épaules, mais quelques instants plus tard, la sensation disparaît, et la voix familière de Trazyn l'Infini envahit votre esprit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}C'tan'ın dikkati sana çevriliyor. Bu insanlık dışı zihnin dokunuşunu, somut bir şeymiş gibi net bir şekilde hissediyorsun. Omuzlarına korkunç bir ağırlık gibi çöküyor ancak birkaç saniye sonra bu ağırlık kayboluyor. Onun yerine Mutlak Trazyn'in tanıdık konuşması, serbest kalan zihnine akmaya başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The C'tan's attention turns to you — you feel it as clearly as if the touch of this inhuman mind were a tangible thing. It lands like a monstrous weight upon your shoulders, but a few moments later, the heaviness disappears — and instead, the familiar speech of Trazyn the Infinite begins to flow into your now free mind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}C'tan'ın dikkati sana çevriliyor. Bu insanlık dışı zihnin dokunuşunu, somut bir şeymiş gibi net bir şekilde hissediyorsun. Omuzlarına korkunç bir ağırlık gibi çöküyor ancak birkaç saniye sonra bu ağırlık kayboluyor. Onun yerine Mutlak Trazyn'in tanıdık konuşması, serbest kalan zihnine akmaya başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der C'tan richtet seine Aufmerksamkeit auf dich — das fühlst du so deutlich, als wäre die Berührung dieses unmenschlichen Verstandes körperlich spürbar. Es landet wie ein monströses Gewicht auf deinen Schultern, aber einige Sekunden später verschwindet die Schwere ... und stattdessen erfüllt die vertraute Stimme von Trazyn dem Unendlichen deinen nun klaren Verstand.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The C'tan's attention turns to you — you feel it as clearly as if the touch of this inhuman mind were a tangible thing. It lands like a monstrous weight upon your shoulders, but a few moments later, the heaviness disappears — and instead, the familiar speech of Trazyn the Infinite begins to flow into your now free mind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der C'tan richtet seine Aufmerksamkeit auf dich — das fühlst du so deutlich, als wäre die Berührung dieses unmenschlichen Verstandes körperlich spürbar. Es landet wie ein monströses Gewicht auf deinen Schultern, aber einige Sekunden später verschwindet die Schwere ... und stattdessen erfüllt die vertraute Stimme von Trazyn dem Unendlichen deinen nun klaren Verstand.{/n}

languages.text: {n}クトンの注意があなたに向けられる。この非人間的な思考に触れるような感覚が、まるで触れることができるもののように感じられる。それは巨大な重石のようにあなたの肩に降りかかるが、数秒後、その重さは消え、代わりにトラズン・ザ・インフィニットのいつもの声があなたの自由になった心に流れ始める。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The C'tan's attention turns to you — you feel it as clearly as if the touch of this inhuman mind were a tangible thing. It lands like a monstrous weight upon your shoulders, but a few moments later, the heaviness disappears — and instead, the familiar speech of Trazyn the Infinite begins to flow into your now free mind.{/n}
